notes: New Wave 12 candidate, Saudi research track. Replaces the originally-recommended taif-rose-festival, which was rejected after independent verification found the festival's own organizers postponed the 2026 edition twice in a row (see project-rejected-event-candidates memory).
Date pattern (mid-December start, 5 consecutive annual editions, no postponement history) confirmed via WebSearch 2026-07-14 against visitsaudi.com, experiencealula.com, alarabiya.net directly.

Uses type:'estimated' with a manually-maintained anchor date, mirroring the existing riyadh-season/jeddah-season pattern (RCU announces exact dates a few weeks ahead each year, requiring periodic manual updates like its siblings).
